comment.body: triaged SkiaSharp.QrCode. others are keep as is.

issue.body:
## Overview

Report period: **2026-04-19 → 2026-05-19**
Active repositories (public, not archived, with activity in the past 30 days): **16**

---

## 🌟 Highlights

### seiton — GitHub Actions Linter ⭐ Most Active
[guitarrapc/seiton](https://github.com/guitarrapc/seiton) had an explosive month with **5 releases** (v0.9.7 → v0.9.11) and heavy feature work:

| Release | Date | Key Changes |
|---------|------|-------------|
| [v0.9.11](https://github.com/guitarrapc/seiton/releases/tag/v0.9.11) | 2026-05-18 | `artipacked` rule, missing docs added ([#85](https://github.com/guitarrapc/seiton/pull/85), [#86](https://github.com/guitarrapc/seiton/pull/86)) |
| [v0.9.10](https://github.com/guitarrapc/seiton/releases/tag/v0.9.10) | 2026-05-15 | CLI rules command, severity/fix info, immutable records, path normalization ([#74–80](https://github.com/guitarrapc/seiton/pull/74)) |
| [v0.9.9](https://github.com/guitarrapc/seiton/releases/tag/v0.9.9) | 2026-05-15 | Performance: reduced allocations, Seiton.Core API refactor ([#71–73](https://github.com/guitarrapc/seiton/pull/71)) |
| [v0.9.8](https://github.com/guitarrapc/seiton/releases/tag/v0.9.8) | 2026-05-15 | Local reusable workflow resolver, `expr-undefined-var` rule ([#69–70](https://github.com/guitarrapc/seiton/pull/69)) |
| [v0.9.7](https://github.com/guitarrapc/seiton/releases/tag/v0.9.7) | 2026-05-13 | `currency-limit`, `fork-imposter-commit`, `permission-scalar` rules; installation docs ([#57–68](https://github.com/guitarrapc/seiton/pull/57)) |

New rules added: `artipacked`, `unsound-condition`, `unpinned-tools`, `unsound-contains`, `bot-conditions`, `currency-limit`, `fork-imposter-commit`, `permission-scalar`, `expr-undefined-var`.

Benchmark reports are auto-updated via CI on every release. 0 open issues. ✅

---

## 📊 Repository Activity Summary

### Active Repositories

| Repository | Commits (30d) | Open Issues | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| [seiton](https://github.com/guitarrapc/seiton) | 10+ | 0 | 5 releases, new linting rules |
| [scoop-bucket](https://github.com/guitarrapc/scoop-bucket) | 10+ | 2 | Auto-bumped: seiton ×5, ecspresso, grpc_health_probe, opa, Chrome |
| [dotfiles-win](https://github.com/guitarrapc/dotfiles-win) | 9 | 0 | AI tool config (.claude), terminal defaults, skill updates |
| [githubactions-lab](https://github.com/guitarrapc/githubactions-lab) | 10+ | 2 | CI tooling update, context dumps, dep bump (#313) |
| [SkiaSharp.QrCode](https://github.com/guitarrapc/SkiaSharp.QrCode) | 2 | 5 | Dependabot bump; 4 open issues pending review |
| [blog](https://github.com/guitarrapc/blog) | 5 | 4 | Dependabot: textlint, hono, actions/setup-node |
| [csharp-lab](https://github.com/guitarrapc/csharp-lab) | 5 | 9 | Dependabot: docker/build-push-action, actions/github-script, docker/login-action |
| [hatenablog-theme-codefocus](https://github.com/guitarrapc/hatenablog-theme-codefocus) | — | 2 | Touched 2026-05-10 |
| [bash-styleguide](https://github.com/guitarrapc/bash-styleguide) | — | 0 | Touched 2026-05-09 |
| [docker-jmeter-gui](https://github.com/guitarrapc/docker-jmeter-gui) | — | 0 | Touched 2026-05-02 |
| [docker-lab](https://github.com/guitarrapc/docker-lab) | — | 1 | Touched 2026-05-02 |
| [dotfiles-linux](https://github.com/guitarrapc/dotfiles-linux) | — | 0 | Touched 2026-04-28 |
| [argocd-lab](https://github.com/guitarrapc/argocd-lab) | — | 0 | Touched 2026-04-28 |
| [InMemoryServerClient](https://github.com/guitarrapc/InMemoryServerClient) | — | 0 | Touched 2026-04-28 |
| [SortAlgorithms](https://github.com/guitarrapc/SortAlgorithms) | — | 0 | Touched 2026-04-28 |
| [local-provisioner](https://github.com/guitarrapc/local-provisioner) | — | 0 | Touched 2026-04-21 |

---

## 🔍 Suspicious Activity

Nothing suspicious observed. Notes:
- Many PRs co-authored by `copilot-swe-agent[bot]` and `Copilot Autofix powered by AI` — this is intentional AI-assisted development (normal usage).
- The `artipacked` rule ([seiton#85](https://github.com/guitarrapc/seiton/pull/85)) went through extensive iterative review with many commits, indicating careful security analysis for the new rule.
- `githubactions-lab` issues #7 and #8 are long-standing test/playground issues (since 2020) — not actionable.

---

## 📋 Open Issues Needing Attention

| Repo | Count | Action |
|---|---|---|
| [csharp-lab](https://github.com/guitarrapc/csharp-lab/issues) | 9 | Review open issues; triage stale ones |
| [SkiaSharp.QrCode](https://github.com/guitarrapc/SkiaSharp.QrCode/issues) | 5 | [#266](https://github.com/guitarrapc/SkiaSharp.QrCode/issues/266) is a v1.0 migration announcement (stale label). Review #292, #294, #296, #299. |
| [blog](https://github.com/guitarrapc/blog/issues) | 4 | Review & triage |
| [scoop-bucket](https://github.com/guitarrapc/scoop-bucket/issues) | 2 | Review |
| [hatenablog-theme-codefocus](https://github.com/guitarrapc/hatenablog-theme-codefocus/issues) | 2 | Review |

---

## ✅ Actionable Next Steps

1. **SkiaSharp.QrCode — plan v1.0**: The `QrCode` class deprecation announcement ([#266](https://github.com/guitarrapc/SkiaSharp.QrCode/issues/266)) has been open since Oct 2025. Set a target date for v1.0 and close stale issues.
2. **csharp-lab — triage 9 open issues**: Several may be stale; run a triage pass.
3. **seiton — 1 open issue**: Check and close/address the remaining open issue.
4. **scoop-bucket — open issues**: Verify 2 open issues are not blocked.
5. **blog — content**: Only dependency bumps this month; consider publishing new content if planned.
6. **dotfiles-win AI tooling**: Several `.claude`/skill-related commits suggest new AI workflow setup — ensure configs are documented for personal reproducibility.

---

*Generated by GitHub Copilot CLI on 2026-05-19. Data from GitHub API covering 2026-04-19 to 2026-05-19.*
